displayName: VAT Return Validation Gate (engine pre-flight well-formedness)
description: The engine-enforced PRE-FLIGHT structural well-formedness gate on the irreversible one-shot. The completion (submitted by the preparer) carries the EXACT nine-box figures that are about to be filed plus the periodKey. A single expression rule settles FULFILLED iff (a) submittedPeriodKey exactly equals the retrieved obligation's periodKey (criteria.obligationPeriodKey) — so the filing provably targets the obligation it was retrieved against — AND (b) the derived boxes are internally consistent to 2dp: totalVatDue == vatDueSales + vatDueAcquisitions (Box3) and netVatDue == |totalVatDue - vatReclaimedCurrPeriod| (Box5). This is a CLIENT-SIDE STRUCTURAL GUARD so a malformed return is caught before the one-shot POST is irreversibly fired — it is NOT HMRC's adjudication. HMRC remains the sole authority: it independently enforces the same arithmetic (VAT_TOTAL_VALUE / VAT_NET_VALUE) and everything else on acceptance. AGLedger enforces structural well-formedness of the submission and holds HMRC's verdict; it does not compute the tax. The <0.005 tolerance absorbs float representation of 2dp money; the gate is derived-field consistency + a cross-record periodKey correlation, not a dodgeable self-attested boolean (anti-F-758). On FULFILLED, open vat-return-declaration-v1 with validationGateRef = this record id.

obligationPeriodKey.description: The periodKey from the retrieved vat-obligation-retrieved-v1. The submitted return must target exactly this period (engine-enforced).

obligationRef.description: Optional recordId of the vat-obligation-retrieved-v1 this gate validates against (chain lineage).

preparedRef.description: Optional recordId of the vat-return-prepared-v1 whose figures are being validated (chain lineage).

submittedPeriodKey.description: The periodKey that will actually be submitted to HMRC. Engine-checked == criteria.obligationPeriodKey.

vatDueSales.description: Box 1 to be filed (may be negative).

vatDueAcquisitions.description: Box 2 to be filed (may be negative).

totalVatDue.description: Box 3 to be filed. Engine-checked == Box1 + Box2 (to 2dp).

vatReclaimedCurrPeriod.description: Box 4 to be filed (may be negative).

netVatDue.description: Box 5 to be filed (>= 0). Engine-checked == |Box3 - Box4| (to 2dp).

fieldMappings.expression: evidence.submittedPeriodKey == criteria.obligationPeriodKey && abs(evidence.totalVatDue - (evidence.vatDueSales + evidence.vatDueAcquisitions)) < 0.005 && abs(evidence.netVatDue - abs(evidence.totalVatDue - evidence.vatReclaimedCurrPeriod)) < 0.005
